overview: LocalBazar Kart is a comprehensive multi-surface commerce and services platform supporting shopping, jobs, healthcare, travel, professional services, manufacturer flows, and 75+ chatbot-driven workflows accessible via WhatsApp, Telegram, SMS, and a web admin dashboard.
features: Single unified flow registry with 75+ flows across all roles
Menu repository synced to flow registry for customer, merchant, delivery partner, and manufacturer menus
Multi-role chat simulator with session persistence and scrollable flow list
Script executor with step-by-step execution and entity save
Flow agent diagnostics with save and history
Manufacturer registration, product management, distributor network, and billing
Customer flows: healthcare, travel, professional services, manufactured products, fun learning, bus/train/flight booking, recharge, bill payments, old items marketplace
Admin sidebar with advertisement and recipe management links
Complete PDF project documentation with all flows, forms, data tables, and scripts
